title: basej-somatic pipeline parameters
description: Single-cell somatic SNP/indel variant filtering pipeline (BAM → VCF → filter).

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

input_csv.description: Path to comma-separated file containing information about the samples in the experiment.
input_csv.help_text: You will need to create a design file with information about the samples in your experiment before running the pipeline. Use this parameter to specify its location. It must be a comma-separated file with at least the columns: biosampleName, bam, bai, and a header row.

workspace.description: Workspace identifier for S3 output layout and tagging.
workspace.help_text: Used in S3 output prefixes and applied as an S3 object tag. Required for standardized output organization.

project.description: Project identifier for S3 tagging and organization.
project.help_text: Applied as an S3 object tag to associate outputs with a specific project.

resume_workflow_id.description: Original workflow_id to reuse when resuming a run, keeping output paths stable and idempotent.
resume_workflow_id.help_text: Set this to the workflow_id of a previous run when resuming so outputs are written to the same S3 location and duplication is avoided. When unset, workflow_id is derived from TOWER_WORKFLOW_ID.

workflow_id.description: Workflow run identifier. Auto-populated from TOWER_WORKFLOW_ID or Nextflow session ID.
workflow_id.help_text: Unique identifier for this workflow run. Used in S3 output paths and tags. Defaults to TOWER_WORKFLOW_ID environment variable if running on Seqera Platform, otherwise uses the Nextflow session ID.

outputDir.description: S3 path where the results will be saved.
outputDir.help_text: The S3 output directory for pipeline results (e.g., 's3://your-output-bucket/analysis/project_name/pipeline-basej-somatic').

timestamp.help_text: Optional timestamp for naming execution reports. Format: 'yyMMdd_HHmmss'.

reference_genome_options.title: Reference genome options
reference_genome_options.description: Define the reference genome and associated files for variant calling.

genome.description: Name of the reference genome to use for variant calling.
genome.help_text: Name of the reference genome. This will automatically configure the reference FASTA and associated files. Supported genomes: GRCh38, GRCh37, GRCm39, ARSUCD2.

reference.description: Path to reference genome FASTA file. Overrides genome-based configuration.

dbsnp_index.description: Path to dbSNP VCF index file.

sequencing_options.title: Sequencing platform options
sequencing_options.description: Options for sequencing platform and compute architecture configuration.

platform.description: Sequencing platform used to generate the BAM data.
platform.help_text: The sequencing platform identifier. Used for platform-specific variant calling settings.

architecture.help_text: The CPU architecture for AWS Batch compute. Use 'arm' for ARM-based instances (Graviton, recommended) or 'x86' for Intel/AMD.
